title: Community Garden Day

image.caption: Community garden day
image.description: Illustration of volunteers planting flowers and vegetables together.

description: Help plant seasonal flowers and vegetables, then share a simple lunch with volunteers.
notes: Bring gloves if you have them.

bg.title: Ден в общностната градина
bg.description: Помогнете със засаждането на сезонни цветя и зеленчуци, след което споделете обяд с доброволците.
